---
title: "Mussel Biomarkers"
subtitle: "Process Notes"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Process Overview

This is where I provide 2-3 sentences about what we're trying to accomplish with this project; the high-level steps will be laid out below.

### Quick Links

1.  Project repo

2.  Literature

3.  Methods

### Protocols Used

1.  Sampling
2.  Bench
3.  Analysis

### Process Roadmap
[] Dissect
[] Assay
[] Standardize and analyze
[] Correlate to contaminants
[] Write

### Log

#### 2026-03-24

Setting up the workflow with the minimum to determine if this system is going to work for me.
